{{CargoClone
|name=Dominator
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=141
|gene1={race} ATK +50
|gene2={race} FTH +50
|gene3=Fire DMG +30
|gene4=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +6
|gene5=Gene Simulation Power Checks -0.9%
|gene6=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +10
|gene7=Gene Simulation Power Checks -1.5%
|}}
